sections.markdown:
- Activity: Afternoon Run
- Started: 2025-06-04 17:32
- Distance: 8.4 km
- Moving time: 45:28
- Elapsed time: 45:31
- Elevation gain: 148.4 m
- Average heart rate: 167.7 bpm
- Max heart rate: 178 bpm
- Average watts: 210.1 W
- Average speed: 11.1 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `4` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `169.7 bpm`, ranging from `160.8` to `176.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `165.7 bpm` and second-half average HR was `173.8 bpm` (+8.1 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `171.4 spm`, with a working range of `101.8` to `173.9 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `169.9 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `171.3 spm` (+1.4 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:25 /km` across `8.395 km` in `45:28` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:17 /km` and second-half pace was `5:33 /km` (+16 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `167.7 bpm` average and `178 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `163.9 bpm` in the first half and `171.3 bpm` in the second (+7.3 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Moving time was `45:28` out of `45:31` elapsed (99.9%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `4` stop segments and `0.4%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `154.8 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `41.6 m` and `61.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `65.8 m` in the first half and `89.0 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
